content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "診所看診問題",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "你好，我昨天有預約，可是今天早上喉嚨很痛，想取消預約。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ zuótiān yǒu yùyuē, kěshì jīntiān zǎoshang hóulóng hěn tòng, xiǎng qǔxiāo yùyuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 zuo2tian1 you3 yu4yue1, ke3shi4 jin1tian1 zao3shang5 hou2long2 hen3 tong4, xiang3 qu3xiao1 yu4yue1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I had an appointment yesterday, but my throat hurts a lot this morning, so I want to cancel the appointment.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 어제 예약을 했는데 오늘 아침에 목이 많이 아파서 예약을 취소하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "沒問題，我幫你處理。請問你的名字和預約時間是幾點？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, wǒ bāng nǐ chǔlǐ. Qǐngwèn nǐ de míngzì hé yùyuē shíjiān shì jǐ diǎn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3 bang1 ni3 chu3li3. Qing3wen4 ni3 de ming2zi4 he2 yu4yue1 shi2jian1 shi4 ji3 dian3?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, I'll help you handle it. May I ask your name and what time the appointment was?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 제가 처리해 드리겠습니다. 성함과 예약 시간이 몇 시인지 여쭤봐도 될까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "我叫王小明，預約是今天上午十點。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, yùyuē shì jīntiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, yu4yue1 shi4 jin1tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "My name is Wang Xiaoming, the appointment was at 10 AM today.",
          "translation_ko": "저는 왕샤오밍이라고 합니다. 예약은 오늘 오전 10시였습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "好的，我已經幫你取消預約了。假如你之後還需要看診，可以再預約。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ yǐjīng bāng nǐ qǔxiāo yùyuē le. Jiǎrú nǐ zhīhòu hái xūyào kànzhěn, kěyǐ zài yùyuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 yi3jing1 bang1 ni3 qu3xiao1 yu4yue1 le5. Jia3ru2 ni3 zhi1hou4 hai2 xu1yao4 kan4zhen3, ke3yi3 zai4 yu4yue1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I've canceled the appointment for you. If you still need to see a doctor later, you can make another appointment.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 예약 취소를 도와드렸습니다. 나중에 진료가 필요하시면 다시 예약하실 수 있습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "謝謝你。那假如我明天想預約，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè nǐ. Nà jiǎrú wǒ míngtiān xiǎng yùyuē, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 jia3ru2 wo3 ming2tian1 xiang3 yu4yue1, ke3yi3 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Thank you. If I want to make an appointment tomorrow, is that okay?",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다. 그럼 내일 예약하고 싶으면 가능할까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "可以，你明天上午或下午都可以。請你打電話來預約。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, nǐ míngtiān shàngwǔ huò xiàwǔ dōu kěyǐ. Qǐng nǐ dǎ diànhuà lái yùyuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, ni3 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 huo4 xia4wu3 dou1 ke3yi3. Qing3 ni3 da3 dian4hua4 lai2 yu4yue1.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, you can come tomorrow morning or afternoon. Please call to make an appointment.",
          "translation_ko": "가능합니다. 내일 오전이나 오후 모두 괜찮습니다. 전화로 예약해 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "病人",
          "text": "好的，我知道了。謝謝你的幫忙。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le5. Xie4xie4 ni3 de bang1mang2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you for your help.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 도와주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Why did the patient want to cancel the appointment?",
          "question_ko": "환자는 왜 예약을 취소하려고 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Because he had a headache", "Because his throat hurt", "Because he was busy"],
          "options_ko": ["두통이 있어서", "목이 아파서", "바빠서"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '取消' and '預約'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '假如你明天不舒服，你會怎麼取消預約？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "遺失物品處理",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我剛剛在你們餐廳吃飯，好像把手機放在座位上了。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ gānggāng zài nǐmen cāntīng chīfàn, hǎoxiàng bǎ shǒujī fàng zài zuòwèi shàng le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si5, wo3 gang1gang1 zai4 ni3men5 can1ting1 chi1fan4, hao3xiang4 ba3 shou3ji1 fang4 zai4 zuo4wei4 shang4 le5.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I just ate at your restaurant, and I think I left my phone on the seat.",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 방금 식당에서 식사했는데 자리에 핸드폰을 두고 온 것 같아요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "請你等一下，我幫你問問看。你經過哪個座位？",
          "pinyin": "Qǐng nǐ děng yīxià, wǒ bāng nǐ wèn wèn kàn. Nǐ jīngguò nǎge zuòwèi?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Qing3 ni3 deng3 yi1xia4, wo3 bang1 ni3 wen4 wen5 kan4. Ni3 jing1guo4 na3ge5 zuo4wei4?",
          "translation_en": "Please wait a moment, I'll ask for you. Which seat did you pass by?",
          "translation_ko": "잠시만 기다려 주세요, 제가 물어보겠습니다. 어느 자리를 지나셨나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我坐在靠窗的那個位子。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ zuò zài kào chuāng de nàge wèizi.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 zuo4 zai4 kao4 chuang1 de5 na4ge5 wei4zi5.",
          "translation_en": "I was sitting at the seat by the window.",
          "translation_ko": "창가 쪽 자리에 앉아 있었어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，我過去看看。假如有找到，我幫你拿過來。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ guòqù kàn kàn. Jiǎrú yǒu zhǎodào, wǒ bāng nǐ ná guòlái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 guo4qu4 kan4 kan5. Jia3ru2 you3 zhao3dao4, wo3 bang1 ni3 na2 guo4lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll go check. If I find it, I'll bring it over for you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 가서 확인해 보겠습니다. 찾으면 가져다 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "麻煩你了，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Máfan nǐ le, xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ma2fan5 ni3 le5, xie4xie4.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you for your trouble.",
          "translation_ko": "번거롭게 해드려 죄송합니다, 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "找到了！是你的手機嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Zhǎodào le! Shì nǐ de shǒujī ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zhao3dao4 le5! Shi4 ni3 de shou3ji1 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Found it! Is this your phone?",
          "translation_ko": "찾았습니다! 이게 당신 핸드폰인가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "對，就是這個！謝謝你幫我處理。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, jiùshì zhège! Xièxiè nǐ bāng wǒ chǔlǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, jiu4shi4 zhe4ge5! Xie4xie4 ni3 bang1 wo3 chu3li3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, that's it! Thank you for helping me handle it.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 맞아요! 처리해 주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer lose?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 잃어버렸습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A wallet", "A phone", "A bag"],
          "options_ko": ["지갑", "핸드폰", "가방"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '經過' and '處理'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '假如你在餐廳忘記帶手機，你會怎麼做？'"
    },
    {
      "title": "更改預約時間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我上個星期有預約今天下午三點，可是臨時有事，想改時間。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ shàngge xīngqī yǒu yùyuē jīntiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn, kěshì línshí yǒu shì, xiǎng gǎi shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 shang4ge5 xing1qi1 you3 yu4yue1 jin1tian1 xia4wu3 san1 dian3, ke3shi4 lin2shi2 you3 shi4, xiang3 gai3 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I made an appointment last week for 3 PM today, but something came up, so I want to change the time.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 지난주에 오늘 오후 3시로 예약했는데 갑자기 일이 생겨서 시간을 변경하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "沒問題，我幫你處理。請問你想改成什麼時候？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, wǒ bāng nǐ chǔlǐ. Qǐngwèn nǐ xiǎng gǎi chéng shénme shíhou?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, wo3 bang1 ni3 chu3li3. Qing3wen4 ni3 xiang3 gai3 cheng2 shen2me5 shi2hou5?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, I'll help you handle it. When would you like to change it to?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 제가 처리해 드리겠습니다. 언제로 변경하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "假如明天上午有空的話，我想改成明天上午十點。",
          "pinyin": "Jiǎrú míngtiān shàngwǔ yǒu kòng dehuà, wǒ xiǎng gǎi chéng míngtiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Jia3ru2 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 you3 kong4 de5hua4, wo3 xiang3 gai3 cheng2 ming2tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "If there's availability tomorrow morning, I'd like to change it to 10 AM tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "내일 오전에 시간이 된다면 내일 오전 10시로 변경하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "我幫你看看。明天上午十點可以，我幫你改時間。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nǐ kàn kàn. Míngtiān shàngwǔ shí diǎn kěyǐ, wǒ bāng nǐ gǎi shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 ni3 kan4 kan5. Ming2tian1 shang4wu3 shi2 dian3 ke3yi3, wo3 bang1 ni3 gai3 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Let me check for you. Tomorrow at 10 AM is available, I'll change the time for you.",
          "translation_ko": "확인해 드리겠습니다. 내일 오전 10시 가능합니다. 시간을 변경해 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "太好了，謝謝你。那原本的預約就取消了嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, xièxiè nǐ. Nà yuánběn de yùyuē jiù qǔxiāo le ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le5, xie4xie4 ni3. Na4 yuan2ben3 de5 yu4yue1 jiu4 qu3xiao1 le5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Great, thank you. So the original appointment is canceled?",
          "translation_ko": "정말 좋네요, 감사합니다. 그럼 원래 예약은 취소된 건가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "櫃檯人員",
          "text": "對，原本的預約已經取消了。明天請準時來。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, yuánběn de yùyuē yǐjīng qǔxiāo le. Míngtiān qǐng zhǔnshí lái.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, yuan2ben3 de5 yu4yue1 yi3jing1 qu3xiao1 le5. Ming2tian1 qing3 zhun3shi2 lai2.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, the original appointment has been canceled. Please come on time tomorrow.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 원래 예약은 취소되었습니다. 내일 정시에 와 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "好的，我知道了。謝謝你的幫忙。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ zhīdào le. Xièxiè nǐ de bāngmáng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 zhi1dao4 le5. Xie4xie4 ni3 de bang1mang2.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I understand. Thank you for your help.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 알겠습니다. 도와주셔서 감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer want to do?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 하고 싶어 했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Cancel the appointment", "Change the appointment time", "Make a new appointment"],
          "options_ko": ["예약 취소", "예약 시간 변경", "새 예약"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '改時間' and '取消'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice saying: '假如你臨時有事，你會怎麼改預約時間？'"
    }
  ]
}
